===''Pokémon the Series''=== [[File:Candice anime.png|thumb|left|250px|Candice in {{aniseries|DP}}]] ===={{aniseries|DP}}==== Candice and [[Zoey]] are childhood friends who met at [[Snowpoint City]]’s {{pkmn|academy|Trainers' School}}. Zoey also refers to Candice as “Miss Senior” because they went to the same school together, while Candice calls her '''Zo-Zo''' (Japanese: '''ノゾチ''' ''Nozotchi'') in return. When they were younger, Candice helped Zoey to take care of a {{TP|Zoey|Glameow}} until Zoey was old enough to begin a {{pkmn|journey}} with it. The two grew up together and promised each other to work hard to fulfill their dreams, with Candice hoping to become a very successful {{pkmn|Trainer}} and Zoey wishing to be a [[Top Coordinator]]. Candice debuted in ''[[DP126|Classroom Training!]]'', where she ambushed {{Ash}}, {{ashfr}} and Zoey with her Abomasnow just for the fun of it. Candice was later revealed to be a teacher at Snowpoint City's Trainers' School, where she teaches its adult class. She then asked Ash to help her teach a class before their [[Gym]] match, and he agreed. Ash and Dawn joined the adult class, which {{TRT}} also enrolled in, though struggled during Candice's riddle-filled quiz session. Later, Candice helped Ash and his friends defeat Team Rocket after they attempted to steal the school's {{i|Poké Ball}}s. Ash {{pkmn|battle}}d Candice in a four-on four match in ''[[DP127|Sliding Into Seventh!]]''. Ash selected {{AP|Grotle}}, and it used {{m|Rock Climb}} to overcome the otherwise slippery ice field and defeat Candice's {{p|Sneasel}}. Her {{p|Medicham}} was knocked out by [[Ash's Staraptor]] in the second round. {{AP|Gliscor}} was unable to hit Candice's {{p|Snover}}, and it was defeated by a barrage of {{t|Grass}} and {{t|Ice}} [[moves]]. Ash called on {{AP|Chimchar}}, and soon the battlefield was filled with steam after Snover's {{m|Icy Wind}} blocked Chimchar's {{m|Flamethrower}}. After Snover was defeated, Candice sent out her powerhouse Abomasnow. Its strong Blizzard forced Ash to recall Chimchar. Abomasnow also defeated Staraptor and later Ash's Grotle. Ash noticing some of the ice fragment sliding on the battlefield, so he had Chimchar snowboard around the field and hit Abomasnow with several Flamethrowers. Abomasnow was hit by a direct {{m|Flame Wheel}}, earning Ash the victory and the {{Badge|Icicle}}. Candice appeared briefly in ''[[DP128|A Pyramiding Rage!]]'', where [[Paul]] challenged her to a Gym battle. She joined everyone in the bleachers and watched Paul go up against {{an|Brandon|Pyramid King Brandon}}. She and Zoey later waved goodbye to Ash, his friends, Paul and [[Reggie]] as the pair prepared to have their own match against each other. Paul earned his own Icicle Badge sometime between the aforementioned episode and ''[[DP131|Pedal to the Mettle!]]''. She made another appearance in ''[[DP155|Double-Time Battle Training!]]'', where she watched Zoey defeat {{OBP|Rebecca|DP155}} in the [[Brussel Town]] [[Pokémon Contest]], earning her fifth [[Ribbon]]. Enthralled by Zoey's battle, she did not even realize that Ash, Dawn, and Brock were sitting next to her in the [[Contest Hall]]. [[File:Candice and Abomasnow.png|thumb|250px|Candice and her Abomasnow]] Later, Candice held a small party for Zoey to celebrate her victory and invited Ash and his friends as well. They enjoyed a table of pastries and desserts as their meal, and Candice shared that her favorite dessert of all is Snowpoint City's [[Tamato Berry]] Ice Cream Sandwich. She described it as "hot and spicy on the inside and cold on the outside", saying that oftentimes things that don't seem to go well together at first are sometimes the most compatible. These words inspired Dawn's idea for the Flame Ice [[Contest combination|combination]]. When Dawn was {{pkmn|training|practicing}} the next day, Candice helped her by showing a variation of the move {{m|Ice Shard}} together with her {{p|Abomasnow}}. She appeared again in ''[[DP161|Yes in Dee Dee, It's Dawn!]]'', where she and Zoey watched Dawn's performance on TV where they saw Dawn's perfected Flame Ice combination in action. She also made another brief cameo appearance in ''[[DP177|A Grand Fight for Winning!]]'', watching the [[Contest Battle]] between Dawn and Zoey in the final round of the [[Sinnoh Grand Festival]] on television along with her students. ====[[Pokémon movie]]s==== Candice made a cameo appearance in the ending credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''. ====Character==== Candice is an overly sweet character who enjoys the fun of surprising her friends in unpredictable ways like ambush attacks or celebratory parties. She is incredibly supportive of her friends' ambitions. She always encourages [[Zoey]] to do her best, and she left [[Snowpoint City]] just to watch Zoey compete in the {{to|Brussel}} {{pkmn|Contest}}. She also helped {{an|Dawn}} to practice for the {{to|Daybreak}} Contest after seeing Dawn struggle to perfect a [[Contest combination|combo]]. Candice is a fantastic mentor, though her positive nature and intense confidence can be overwhelming. Her trademark is using the term "{{wp|kiai}}" in regular speech instead of as a sound effect, such as in the line, "Get your kiai on!". She doesn't take her role as the [[Snowpoint City]] [[Gym Leader]] too seriously, namely because she rarely gets challengers. However, Candice does enjoy the feeling of victory and strives to perform her best. Candice has trained her Pokémon to overcome their respective [[type]] disadvantages, where her {{p|Snover}} and {{p|Abomasnow}} were shown to be able to blow away typically effective {{t|Fire}} attacks. She attacks her opponents with an intense barrages of attacks, and her Pokémon can also deliver knock out [[physical attack]]s at close-range. ====Pokémon==== =====On hand===== {{MissingInfo|2|enva|java}} This listing is of Candice's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Abomasnow |type1=Grass |type2=Ice |img=Candice Abomasnow.png |epnum=DP126 |epname=Classroom Training! |vajp=Chie Satō |vaen=Marc Thompson |desc=Candice's main Pokémon and the major powerhouse of her team is {{p|Abomasnow}}. She first appeared battling [[Zoey's Glameow]] [[DP126|soon after]] Ash and {{ashfr}} entered [[Snowpoint City]]. She was later paired with {{AP|Buizel}} to help stop {{TRT}} from stealing the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}} supply of Pokémon. In ''[[DP127|Sliding Into Seventh!]]'', Abomasnow was Candice's final Pokémon in her Gym battle against Ash. Abomasnow knocked out Staraptor and Grotle before Chimchar defeated her with {{m|Flame Wheel}}. Abomasnow made another appearance in ''[[DP155|Double-Time Battle Training!]]'', where Candice used her to demonstrate move combinations for {{an|Dawn}}. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[DP183|League Unleashed!]]''. Abomasnow briefly appeared alongside Candice during the ending credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''. Abomasnow's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Wood Hammer}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, {{m|Ice Punch}}, and {{m|Razor Leaf}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Sneasel |type1=Dark |type2=Ice |img=Candice Sneasel.png |epnum=DP127 |epname=Sliding Into Seventh! |vajp=Satsuki Yukino |vaen=Kayzie Rogers |desc={{p|Sneasel}} was the first Pokémon used by Candice during her Gym battle against {{Ash}} when she went up against {{AP|Grotle}}. Although Sneasel had an obvious [[type]] advantage and could skate across the icy battlefield, Grotle was able to use its new defensive battle technique to absorb Sneasel's attacks and knocked her out with {{m|Rock Climb}}. Sneasel's known moves are {{m|Icy Wind}} and {{m|Fury Swipes}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Medicham |type1=Fighting |type2=Psychic |img=Candice Medicham.png |epnum=DP127 |epname=Sliding Into Seventh! |vajp= |vaen=Emily Jenness |desc=Candice's second choice was {{p|Medicham}}. Medicham was sent up against {{AP|Staraptor}}. Despite a good battle, she was knocked out by Staraptor's {{m|Brave Bird}}. Medicham's known moves are {{m|Confusion}} and {{m|Fire Punch}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Snover |gender=female |type1=Grass |type2=Ice |img=Candice Snover.png |epnum=DP127 |epname=Sliding Into Seventh! |vajp=Satsuki Yukino |vaen=Carter Cathcart{{!}}Billy Beach |desc={{p|Snover}} was Candice's third Pokémon to be used, and she proved to be a powerful {{pkmn|battle}}r, knowing plenty of {{t|Ice}} and {{t|Grass}} attacks that were used to defeat [[Ash's Gliscor]]. However, Snover was knocked out by [[Ash's Chimchar]]. Snover's known moves are {{m|Razor Leaf}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Bullet Seed}}, and {{m|Icy Wind}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Dodrio |type1=Normal |type2=Flying |img=Candice Dodrio.png |epnum=DP128 |epname=A Pyramiding Rage! |desc=Candice has a {{p|Dodrio}} that she used as a mode of transportation in ''[[DP128|A Pyramiding Rage!]]''. None of Dodrio's moves are known.}} =====Temporary===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Candice |pkmn=Turtwig |type1=Grass |img=Candice Turtwig.png |epnum=DP126 |epname=Classroom Training! |desc=Candice used a {{p|Turtwig}} when she was younger in the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}}, as seen in a flashback in ''[[DP126|Classroom Training!]]''. It is unknown if it is now in her ownership or if it still is used for youngsters in the Trainers' School. None of Turtwig's moves are known.}} =====Helped raise===== {{TrainerPoké |main=yes |trainer=Zoey |pkmn=Glameow |type1=Normal |img=Candice Zoey Glameow.png |epnum=DP011 |epname=Mounting a Coordinator Assault! |vajp=Ikue Ohtani |vaen=Ikue Ohtani |desc=Candice stated that she helped raise [[Zoey]]'s {{p|Glameow}} when she was younger. Zoey kept it in a shed outside the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}} when her parents would not let her have it. One day, [[Mr. Honcho]], the headmaster of the school, found out what Zoey was doing. Candice stepped in, and Mr. Honcho eventually gave in. Candice and Glameow have been friends ever since.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{ice color}}|bordercolor={{ice color light}} |ja=下屋則子 ''[[Noriko Shitaya]]'' |en=[[Kether Donohue]] |fi=Annituuli Kasurinen |fr_eu=Maia Baran |hi=रूचा दिघे ''Rucha Dighe'' (Marvel HQ/ Hungama TV) |no=Hanne Dancke Arnesen |pl=Monika Pikuła |es_la=Cristina Hernández ([[DP126]]-[[DP128]])
